english: I belong to the Mmamba clan
I am from the Ngabi clan
The king is the ruler of Buganda

luganda: Buganda erina emiwendo nyo gy'okukola entalo

english: I am proud to be Baganda
The clan head made a decision

luganda: Matoke gwe yambirira eyo eya Buganda
Ekika kya maama yange kiri mwaanyi

english: The kingdom prospers under the Kabaka
I will teach my children our traditions
luganda: Nzija okuwoza abaana bange enkola yeffe

english: Ritual is part of our culture
The blessing of the elders is sought

luganda: Kabaka ye yagendereza mu muwendo gwa nkola

english: Buganda is a kingdom with pride
luganda: Buganda ye kingdom ng'efuna ekitiibwa kya kabaka

english: I carry my clan's name with honor
The king is crowned with ceremony
luganda: Kabaka awetibwa mu ekigazi kya kulunnyanya

english: Clan history is rich and deep
luganda: Emiwendo gy'ekika kyaffe gikira mu miwaliro

english: I inherit customs from my ancestors
My family lineage is traced through clan
luganda: Omwanzo gwange gukooweze mu kika kyaffe

english: The Mmamba clan symbol is strength
luganda: Ekika kya Mmamba kya maanyi ku kifo

english: We celebrate under the Kabaka's rule

luganda: Enkola ewedde nka yo yonna enya yeffe

english: I speak the language of my people
I am bound to my clan always
luganda: Njisibwa ekika kyange mu kiseera kyonna

english: My ancestors watch over my path
luganda: Emwanzo gyange ginenya ku njira yange

english: Respect brings honor to your name
luganda: Okussegeza kunabira ekitiibwa mu linnya lyo
Obwakabaka bwa Buganda busigala mu kiseera
Ekifo kya Kabaka kikisa omwaka oguwanvu

english: I honor the way of my fathers
The totem is sacred to the clan
luganda: Muzizo gwe kifo kya kabika kyaffe

english: We gather to celebrate the Kabaka
The king walks with great authority
The Buganda kingdom is ancient and wise
luganda: Obwakabaka bwa Buganda kikira mu miwaliro

english: Clan pride runs through my blood
luganda: Kitiibwa kya kika kyange kikira mu misima gwange
